hero.label: Full-Stack Developer · 2024
hero.name: Akshay
hero.subtitle: Front to back.
hero.bio: I craft pixel-perfect UIs and architect scalable backends — turning ideas into fast, functional, beautiful products. 1 year in, infinitely curious.

about.para1: I'm a full-stack developer with 1 year of experience building web applications that live at the intersection of great design and solid engineering. I care deeply about both how things look and how they work under the hood.
about.para2: On the frontend, I obsess over performance, accessibility, and motion. On the backend, I build RESTful APIs, design schemas, and make sure the data flows clean. I believe good software is both an engineering challenge and a creative act.
about.para3: Currently open to new opportunities — remote or onsite.

projects.title: Project One — Your Best Work
projects.description: A full-stack application with real-time features, JWT authentication, and a polished React frontend. Built a custom REST API with Express and PostgreSQL handling 1000+ requests per day.

projects.title: Dashboard UI
projects.description: A data visualization dashboard with real-time charts, dark mode, and responsive design. Built with React, TypeScript, and Recharts.

projects.title: REST API Service
projects.description: A robust REST API with auth, rate limiting, and full CRUD operations. Documented with Swagger and deployed on Railway with 99.9% uptime.

experience.desc: Built and maintained React frontends and Node.js backend services. Collaborated with senior devs on database design and API architecture. Shipped 5+ features in a production environment.
Developed responsive UI components in React, worked closely with designers to implement pixel-perfect layouts and improve mobile performance scores by 40%.

experience.company: Mangalore Institute of Technology & Engineering · Karnataka
experience.desc: Graduated with a focus on software engineering fundamentals. Built personal projects in web development and algorithms throughout all four years.
